creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Trying, but I'm stuck following the Porter's handbook and trying to write a valid GH_TUPLE
The format is account`:`project`:`tagname`:`group`/`subdir. The `/`subdir part is optional.
I do not understand this `group` thing and started guessing.

rtpproxy > git submodule status
 1f928f6399068233de546678da3815c39367cd72 external/libre (v0.4.17-134-g1f928f6)
 8ff8d609484a0ffcf4eca1a5851f2c15687828d5 external/libucl (0.8.1-13-g8ff8d60)
 94e5f23e736f2bb67ebdf90727353e65344f9fc0 external/xxHash (v0.8.0)
 395e565b565ec222baa22bf0b8b67d7c812fe0a2 hepconnector (heads/master)
 5691e9285d3bf08a1c98e82659ce78a5a7594447 libelperiodic (v1.4-12-g5691e92)

GH_TUPLE=       creytiv:re:v0.4.17:re/external/libre \
                sippy:libucl:0.8.1:libucl/external/libucl \
                Cyan4973:xxHash:v0.8.0:xxHash/external/xxHash \
                sobomax:libelperiodic:v1.4/libelperiodic \
                sippy:hepconnector:395e565b565ec222baa22bf0b8b67d7c812fe0a2/hepconnector

resulting in this fail:
=> sippy-hepconnector-v3.1.0-395e565b565ec222baa22bf0b8b67d7c812fe0a2-hepconnector_GH0.tar.gz is not in /usr/ports/net/rtpproxy/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/net/rtpproxy/distinfo is out of date, or
=> sippy-hepconnector-v3.1.0-395e565b565ec222baa22bf0b8b67d7c812fe0a2-hepconnector_GH0.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Any help?
